name: ielts-plugin
description: Chrome Extension for IELTS Online Tests with AI-powered scoring

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:js && npm run copy-files
scripts.build:js: esbuild src/content/contentScript.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/src/content/contentScript.js && esbuild src/background/service-worker.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/src/background/service-worker.js && esbuild src/popup/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/src/popup/popup.js
scripts.copy-files: npm run copy-manifest && npm run copy-popup-html && npm run copy-icons
scripts.copy-icons: mkdir -p dist/icons && echo 'Add icon files to icons/ directory'
